title: Bluey Telephone Electronic Playset Kids Toy Phone Realistic Retro Mobile Interactive Play For Children
features: 📞 Interactive Bluey Fun – Shaped like Bluey, this toy telephone brings interactive play to life with realistic ringing sounds, Bluey's theme tune, and character phrases straight from the show!
🔢 Encourages Learning – Kids can dial numbers to hear fun sounds, helping develop early numerical skills and introducing them to phone use in a playful way.
🚗 Pull-Along Design – With wheels and a pull cord, this Bluey phone is not only fun to play with but also easy to take on the go, boosting mobility and exploration.
🎶 Call Back & Theme Tune – Press the center button to switch between the Bluey theme song and ringing bell sounds, and enjoy a special call-back feature for added excitement!
🧠 Imaginative & Social Play – Perfect for sparking role-play and social interaction, helping children build confidence and creativity while they pretend to make and receive calls.
🔋 Ready to Go – Requires 2 x AA batteries (display batteries included), so kids can start enjoying their Bluey phone right out of the box! Suitable for ages 18 months+.
description: 📞This Bluey Telephone for kids is an engaging interactive toy designed to spark imaginative play and social interaction. Shaped like Bluey, it includes realistic ringing sounds, the iconic Bluey theme tune, and fun character phrases when kids dial the numbers. With a pull-along design complete with wheels, children can take their phone on adventures around the house. The call-back feature and easy-to-press center button make it exciting for little ones to pretend they’re making real calls, while developing early numerical skills. Suitable for ages 18 months and up, this phone requires 2 x AA batteries (display batteries included) so play can start right away!
